summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Incorrect device name on DFU success screen while updating just the Charge Stand
scenario: When updating only the Charge Stand firmware via DFU, the success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
description_clean: When updating only the Charge Stand firmware via DFU, the success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
steps: Open the DFU (Device Firmware Update) tool.
Select the Charge Stand as the device to update.
Initiate the firmware update process for the Charge Stand only.
Wait for the update to complete.
Observe the success screen displayed after the update.
expected: The success screen should display the Charge Stand name.
actual: The success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
